name: Adventure of Emberclaw
short_description: Adventure of Emberclaw is an exhilarating action-adventure 3D platformer that promises both challenge and fun.
detailed_description:
Adventure of Emberclaw is an exhilarating action-adventure 3D platformer that promises both challenge and fun. Join Emberclaw, a lovable little dragon, as he battles enemies, navigates treacherous levels, and collects dynamite on his quest to defend his world.

With the guidance of his mother dragon, Emberclaw must defend their home from a looming alien invasion and ultimately confront Eggalor the alien king.

Throughout his breathtaking journey, Emberclaw will encounter a variety of foes and uncover vital clues. From the depths of the earth to the heights of the clouds, through treacherous mines and vast oceans, and even across a volcanic castle to the stars, he bravely embarks on a mystical adventure that tests his courage and determination.

supported_languages:
English*, Korean
*languages with full audio support
